Motion To Transfer Case To Los Angeles County For Enforcement
Off Calendar Nov-28-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF LEGALMATCH.COM'S Motion To Transfer Case To Los Angeles County For Enforcement is denied. Proof of service is not valid. "I caused" does not show personal knowledge, and method of service is unclear. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
